top_signals.title: Spot bitcoin ETFs shed $1.26 billion in worst week since late January as ether funds see 10-day outflow streak
top_signals.summary: BlackRock's IBIT now holds $61.1 billion in net assets against $64.8 billion in cumulative inflows, a difference of roughly $3.7 billion.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
